MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2020 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-22-2020 Off Calendar

Crcm'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jonathan Theonugraha, Esq. of K&L GATES, T:415.882.8061, for plaintiff/moving party;
Frank D. Rorie, Esq. of the LAW OFFICE OF FRNAK D. RORIE, JR., T:323.337.9054, for defendant/opposing party, on Court Call.

RULING: Defendant's counsel contested and argued the tentative ruling. After arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CRCM OPPORTUNITY FUND II, L.P. CRCM'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint, as follows:

Plaintiff CRCM Opportunity Fund II, L.P.'s motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. "The policy favoring amendment is so strong that denial of leave to amend can rarely be justified." (Edmon & Karnow, California Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial (TRG 2016) 6:639.) Defendant has not shown that it will be prejudiced by the amendment.

In addition, the Court grants plaintiff 10 days leave to file and serve his first amended complaint.

The Court modified and signed the order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
